instruction: The small pink dot should not be off-white. Restore its proper color on the align left icon.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/align-left.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="17" y1="10" x2="3" y2="10"/><line x1="21" y1="6" x2="3" y2="6"/><line x1="21" y1="14" x2="3" y2="14"/><line x1="17" y1="18" x2="3" y2="18"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#fafafa" cx="112" cy="112" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/align-left.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="17" y1="10" x2="3" y2="10"/><line x1="21" y1="6" x2="3" y2="6"/><line x1="21" y1="14" x2="3" y2="14"/><line x1="17" y1="18" x2="3" y2="18"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#ec4899" cx="112" cy="112" r="2" />
</svg>
